free_text: Neutron scattering from bismuth, strontium and sodium
A beam of 225 keV deuterons struck a Ti-3H target
* NE102A plastic sheet of thickness 50. mu-m for alphas
Efficiency up to 12.5 MeV was determined by scattering
of 14.8 MeV neutrons from polythene. The absolute value
of efficiency at 14.8 MeV was measured separately.
